description: BABY 3 PIECE SLEEPSUIT SET: Introducing our set of 3 baby sleepsuits. This gorgeous baby set comprises of three baby sleepsuits, essential for those early precious months, helping to create cherished memories. HIGH QUALITY FABRIC: The baby set includes 3 long sleeved sleepsuits with enclosed feet and press stud popper fastening to the front ensuring they are soft and comfortable to wear. Made from soft 100% Cotton material, ensures its soft and breathable for baby. Also with the added style of a ribbed material fabric on two of the sleepsuits. They are machine washable and made to last for baby. DELICATE DESIGN PATTERNS: The baby sleepsuits come in 3 different soft hues of pink colourways, accompanied by showcasing delicate designs. PERFECT GIFT IDEA: The baby sleepsuit set is perfect as a Welcome Home present, Baby Shower gift, Baby Essentials, Baby Reveal and Announcements! SLEPPSUIT SIZES INCLUDE: Newborn, 0-3 Months, 3-6 Months, 6-9 Months, 9-12 Months, 12-18 Months, 18-24 Months.
